subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath sent down the verses and made them clear evidences for the peoples of all religions. The Fire crieth out upon the Mount [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی نزل الایات و جعلها بینات لاهل الادیان تنادی النار فی الطور و
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @prophecy and fulfillment, @justice and wrath of God
